    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”Hurry!!! Hand over the samples!! Excellent!!” *jumps up and down* Crew: “And… the reward you mentioned? Let me guess a bug leg?” Xhargreg: ”No… I can’t spare anything that valuable… take that pile of glowing cube like things that the wasps brought back… for some reason???” Crew: “Errr… is that a pile of Artifacts??” Even Larger Giant Mutated Wasp: “Bzz!!!!” Crew: “Eeeek!” Crew: “I supposes that’s a ‘yes’… errr… thanks?”
